items.name: Dead Line
items.description: When this card is played search one “Conduit” or “Vessel” from your discard pile, and add it to your hand.

items.name: Agro When Powered
items.description: When this card is played within the circuit, the opposing card is immediately dealt 1 damage.

items.name: Hopper
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to any empty space on your side of the field.

items.name: Buff When Powered
items.description: When this card is within a circuit, its power stat is increased by 2.

items.name: Aggro When Powered
items.description: When this card is played within a circuit, it immediately strikes the opposing card for 1 damage.

items.name: Flight When Powered
items.description: While this card is within a circuit, this card attacks the opponent directly instead of the opposing card.

items.name: Venom When Powered
items.description: While this card is within a circuit, when it damages an opposing card, that card instantly perishes.

items.name: Pure When Powered
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, the opposing card’s sigils are nullified.

items.name: Motivation When Powered
items.description: While this card is within a circuit, adjacent cards gain 1 power.

items.name: Attack Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, all cards inside the circuit gain 1 power.

items.name: Bomb Latch
items.description: When this card perishes, choose a card to gain the Detonator sigil. When that card perishes, adjacent and opposing cards and dealt 10 damage.

items.name: Fuel
items.description: During your play step, you may pay 3 bones to gain an energy cell.

items.name: Power Play
items.description: During your play step, you can pay 1 max energy to roll a 6 sided die. This cards’ power is equal to the number rolled.

items.name: Blood Storage
items.description: Once per turn, you may sacrifice a card to increase this card’s health by 1. When this card is sacrificed, it loses health equal to the blood cost of the card played, instead of perishing.

items.name: Magickal Bleach
items.description: When this card is played, target 1 card on the field. Any sigils that card has are negated until it perishes.

items.name: Spiritual Persistance
items.description: When this card is played, choose a card on the board. When that card perishes the next card to be played in its spot will inherit all of that card’s sigils.

items.name: Diver When Powered
items.description: While this card is a part of a circuit, attacks targeting this card instead hit the owner of this card directly.

items.name: Recover When Powered
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, during your end step, this card gains 1 health, to a maximum of 5 health.

items.name: Spiteful
items.description: When this card kills an opposing card, gain 2 bones.

items.name: Recycle Bin
items.description: When this card is played, search your discard pile for 1 card and add it to your hand.

items.name: Endless Hunger
items.description: When this card damages the health of an opposing card its health increases by one. This effect can exceed the max health of this card.

items.name: Purple Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, it provides 1 “Purple Gem”.

items.name: Strong Hand
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of cards in the player’s hand.

items.name: Marked Hand
items.description: When this card is played, discard until your hand has no more than 3 cards. (If you have already have 3 or fewer cards in hand, do not discard.)

items.name: Relentless
items.description: When this card strikes an opposing space, the opposing cards sigils are ignored.

items.name: Scrawny
items.description: When this card is sacrificed to play another card, that card loses power and health equal to this card’s power and health.

items.name: Hoarder
items.description: When this card is played, search any 1 card from your deck and add it to your hand.

items.name: Unspeakable
items.description: While searching your deck for a specified card, this card may be searched instead.

items.name: Insta-Bomber
items.description: When this card is played, target 1 card on the field, that card is dealt 10 damage.

items.name: Energy Gun
items.description: During your play step, you can pay 1 energy to deal 1 damage to a card opposing this card.

items.name: Bastion
items.description: When this card receives damage, it only receives half the damage, rounded up.

items.name: Bloodless
items.description: This card cannot be sacrificed.

items.name: Gem Scrambler
items.description: During your end step, this card switches places with a “Mox” card you control if possible.

items.name: Sentry
items.description: When a card is played or moved opposite this card, this card deals the opposing card 1 damage.

items.name: Wild Magick
items.description: While this card is on the field all “Mox” cards on your side of the field strike the opposing card for 1 damage when played.

items.name: Blood Magic
items.description: While this card is on the field, you may sacrifice “Mox” cards on your side of the field.

items.name: Mox Mixer
items.description: During your play step, you may search any 1 “Mox” card form your side deck and replace any “Mox” card on your side of the board, shuffling the replaced card into your side deck. This can only be done once per turn.

items.name: Telekenisis
items.description: During your play step, you may move any 1 of your cards to an empty lane on your side of the field, or move any 1 of your opponent’s cards to an empty lane on their side of the field. This can only be used once per turn.

items.name: Sturdy
items.description: This card cannot be hammered.

items.name: Stop Sign
items.description: Opposing cards cannot move.

items.name: Stimulate
items.description: During your play step, you can pay 2 max energy to increase the power of this card by 1, if this card has 5 power, this effect cannot be used, this effect can be used once per turn.

items.name: Frozen Away
items.description: When this card perishes, search 1 “[Token]” from your deck and play it in this card’s place.

items.name: Levitate
items.description: Once per turn during your play step, you may pay 2 bones to make a card of your choice deal damage directly the next time they are to attack.

items.name: Scary
items.description: All opposing cards lose 1 power.

items.name: Divination
items.description: When this card is played, look at the top 3 cards of your deck, rearrange them in any order, and play them back on top of your deck.

items.name: Sniper
items.description: When this card attacks, it can target any 1 space on the opponents side of the field.

items.name: Rotting
items.description: During your end step, this card loses 1 health and 1 power.

items.name: Second-Hand Smoke
items.description: During your end step, cards opposing and adjacent to this card will lose 1 health and 1 power.

items.name: Ironworks
items.description: Once per turn, you may spend 3 max energy to increase the power and health of a card of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 5.

items.name: Small
items.description: Any damage that would be done to this card is done to you as direct damage instead.

items.name: Made Of Stone
items.description: This card is uneffected by the effects of the “Touch Of Death” and “Stinky” sigils.

items.name: Mox Complex
items.description: While this card is on the field, all “mox” cards perish during you and your opponents end step.

items.name: Ravenous
items.description: While this card is on the field, during your draw step you must sacrifice one card or this card perishes.

items.name: The House Special
items.description: Once per turn, you may spend 3 max energy to either increase the power of a card of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 5, or make your opponent discard a card of their choice from their hand.

items.name: Ruby Heart
items.description: When this card perishes, search 1 “Ruby Mox” from your side and play it in this space.

items.name: Stack Powered
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of cards in its stack, up to a maximum of 5.

items.name: Mox Containment
items.description: When this card is played, it takes on any “Gem” providing sigils of the card that was shattered to pay its cost.

items.name: Gem Detonator
items.description: While this card is on the field, all “Mox” cards on your side of the field deal 10 damage to adjacent and opposing cards when they perish.

items.name: Reanimate
items.description: When this card is played choose one card in your discard pile, return it to your hand. This card cannot target cards named “Reanimator” with its effect.

items.name: Gem Digger
items.description: During your end step, this card generates bones equal to the number of gems provided on your side of the field, to a maximum of 3 bones.

items.name: Moximum Enchantment
items.description: While this card completes a pillar field, this card provides 2 gems of any color.

items.name: Mox Swapper
items.description: Once per turn, you may sacrifice a “mox” card on your field to choose a card. Swap the attack and health of the chosen card.

items.name: Buff Enchantment
items.description: When this card completes a spell field, all non pillar cards within gain 1 power.

items.name: Prism Gem
items.description: While this card is on the field, it provides 1 gem of any color.

items.name: Aggrevating
items.description: When this card is played, a card of your choice on either side of the board attacks prematurely. They will still attack normally during the battle step.

items.name: Desiring
items.description: During your play step, you may destroy this card to clear the board. All cleared cards, aside from this one, are returned to their respective decks. This effect can not be used the turn this card was played in.

items.name: Avarice
items.description: During your play step, you may discard one card of your choice from your hand in order to search 1 card from your discard pile to your hand once per turn.

items.name: Overwhelmingly Tacky
items.description: While this card is on the field, all enemy cards will focus and attack this card instead of what they’d normally attack.

items.name: Pot Powered
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of unique “Pot” cards on your side of the field and in your discard.

items.name: Greedy
items.description: During your play step you may destroy this card to draw 2 cards from either deck.

items.name: Generous
items.description: When this card is played, return 1 card of your choice from your hand to your deck, shuffle and draw 2 cards.

items.name: Death Powered
items.description: This card’s power is equal to half the number of bone’s collected by its owner, rounded down.

items.name: Cowardly
items.description: When a card is played opposite this one, this card perishes.

items.name: Null Conduit
items.description: This card may complete a circuit, but provides no effect.

items.name: Bloodsucker
items.description: When this card damages the health of an opposing card, this card restores 1 health, up to this card’s maximum.

items.name: Blackmail
items.description: When this card is played, your opponent discards a card of their choice.

items.name: Mirmox
items.description: This cards’ power is equal to the total number of opposing gem providing cards on your opponents field.

items.name: Aggressive Anticipation
items.description: When this card is played, look at the top 3 cards of your opponent’s deck, then rearrange them.

items.name: Everlasting Love
items.description: While this card is within your discard, you may shatter 2 cards that provide gems to search this card to your hand.

items.name: Til Death Do Us Part
items.description: This card perishes instantly if the cards “Magickal Maid” and “Wild Witch” are not in your discard.

items.name: Never The End
items.description: When this card is played, flip and shuffle your discard pile. While this card is on the board, you may draw from your discard pile as if it were a normal deck, shuffling after every draw. Discarded cards go on the bottom of the pile.

items.name: Rally
items.description: When this card is played, you may immediately play one card that costs red gems or yellow gems from your hand for no cost.

items.name: Call of the Haunted
items.description: During your play step, you may pay 4 bones to choose a card, the next time the chosen card would be damaged, negate that damage.

items.name: Looter
items.description: When this card deals damage directly, draw a card for each damage dealt by this card.

items.name: Gate
items.description: During your end step, after all other effects subside, you may rearrange your board (and stacks, if you have any).

items.name: Rotten Feast
items.description: While this card is on the field, when you play a card that costs blood or bones, you may substitute 3 bones of the cards cost for 1 blood, or 1 blood of the cards cost for 3 bones.

items.name: Elder Brain
items.description: When this card is played search one “Ceremorph” card from your deck to your hand. While this card is on the field, you may play any and all “Ceremorph” cards without paying their costs.

items.name: Rumor Mill
items.description: Pay 2 energy to look at your opponent’s hand.

items.name: Great Service
items.description: Pay 4 energy to set the attack of a card your opponent controls to 0 until the end of their next turn.

items.name: Wishbone
items.description: While this card is on the field, all “Mox” cards on your side of the field produce 4 bones when destroyed.

items.name: Gem Gamble
items.description: During your play step, you may destroy one mox card on your side of the field to search a card from your deck, then randomly discard a card from you hand. After the effect ends, deal one damage to a card on the opponent’s field.

items.name: Impaling
items.description: When this card attacks, it will damage both the card in front of it, as well as the scales directly.

items.name: Wise
items.description: When this card is played, search any card from your side deck to your hand.

items.name: True Scholar
items.description: During your play step, if you have a blue gem on the filed, you may discard a card of your choice from your hand or your side of the field to draw a card from either deck.

items.name: Divert Fate
items.description: When this card is played, draw 5 cards from either deck and set them aside. You may take any card from the pile instead of drawing.

items.name: Perfume
items.description: The opposing card is enamored reducing their attack by 1.

items.name: Gorgeous
items.description: If the space opposing this card is empty, the opponent must play their next card in front of this card, so that it may bask in this card’s glory.

items.name: Magnus Gems
items.description: During your play step, you may change which 3 gems this card provides, this can only be done once per turn. The gems can be of any color, except prism you may select multiple of the same color mox for this card to provide.

items.name: Tidy Up
items.description: When this card is played return a card on your side of the field to your hand, then draw a card from your side deck.

items.name: Annoying
items.description: The card opposing this one gains 1 power.

items.name: Clinger
items.description: When a card is played on your side of the field, this card moves to the closest empty lane.

items.name: Unearned Fortune
items.description: While this card is on the field, you may use your opponent’s bones, energy, and mox, as if they were your own.

items.name: Convalesce
items.description: During your end step, this card gains 1 health, up to its maximum.

items.name: Steel Trap
items.description: When this card perishes by battle, the opposing card is dealt 10 damage.

items.name: Fuel Leak
items.description: When this card perishes, it provides 2 energy cell to its owner.

items.name: Mark For Death
items.description: Once per turn, you may pay 3 bones to deal 3 damage to a card of your choice.

items.name: Hat Trick
items.description: Puts on quite the show.

items.name: Brewery
items.description: Once per turn, during your play step you may pay 3 bones to search 1 card from your side deck.

items.name: Gem Guardian
items.description: While this card is on the field, any attacks targeting “Mox” cards on your side of the field are negated.

items.name: Mox Powered
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of “Mox” cards on your side of the field, to a maximum of 5.

items.name: All Seeing
items.description: While this card is on the field, when you draw from your main deck, you may search for a specific card.

items.name: Envision
items.description: While this card is on the field, your opponent must play their hand exposed to you.

items.name: Gourmet Gulper
items.description: During your play step, you can pay 2 max energy to increase the health of this card by 1. If this card has 5 health, this effect cannot be used. This effect can be used once per turn.

items.name: Abundance
items.description: You may run up to 6 copies of this card in your deck.

items.name: Gembound
items.description: This card gains stats depending on what gems are in play when summoned. Ruby Gems increase power by 1. Emerald Gems, aside from the 2 need to play it, increase health by 2. Sapphire Gems decrease cost by 1 gem per 2 Sapphire Gems available.

items.name: Null Enchantment
items.description: This card may complete a spell field but provided no effect.

items.name: Mox Miner
items.description: When this card kills an opposing card, you may draw a “Mox” card from your side deck.

items.name: Gem Addict
items.description: While this card is on the field all “Gem Fiend” cards will cost 1 more blue gem to play.

items.name: Mox Eater
items.description: When a “Mox” card you control perishes, you may play this card in its place for half its cost.

items.name: Channel The Lost
items.description: Once per turn, you may pay 6 bones, then choose a card. That card also provides a purple gem in addition to its sigils for its owner until it perishes.

items.name: Scry
items.description: When this card is played, look at the top 3 cards of your main deck then rearrange them, then draw a card from your main deck.

items.name: Unforgivable
items.description: This card’s stats cannot be increased by the sigils of other cards.

items.name: Disgraceful
items.description: Once per turn, you can discard up to 5 cards from the top of your deck. This card’s power becomes equal to the number of discarded cards, until the end of this turn.

items.name: Nature Protector
items.description: While this card is on the field, any attacks against cards you control costing 1 blood are negated.

items.name: Repulsive
items.description: If an opposing card would attack this card, negate that attack.

items.name: Incorporeal
items.description: Attacks targeting this card instead hit the owner of this card directly.

items.name: Prism Heart
items.description: When this card perishes, search 1 “Prism Mox” from your main or side deck and play it in this space.

items.description: During your play step, you may discard a card from this card’s stack to deal 1 damage to the opposing space.

items.name: Mana Manipulation
items.description: This cards power becomes equal to the amount of gems shattered this turn.

items.name: Mox Dropper
items.description: During your end step, this card shifts to an adjacent empty lane. Search 1 “Mox” card from your side deck and play it in this card’s previous lane.

items.name: Power Siphon
items.description: Once per turn, during your play step, you may return a card from your side of the board to your deck to gain 2 max energy.

items.description: While this card is on the field, all “Pillar” cards on your side of the field gain 1 power.

items.name: Energy Bomb
items.description: If you have no energy this card perishes, and does 10 damage to adjacent cards. (Your opponent’s cards are unharmed.)

items.name: Electrogenesis
items.description: Once per turn, when you would play a card that costs blood, you may pay 3 max energy to lower the number of sacrifices needed by 1.

items.name: Drowsy
items.description: When this card is played, the card opposing this card is unable to attack next turn.

items.name: Gem Dependant
items.description: If there are no gems on your side of the field, this card perishes.

items.name: Haunter
items.description: When this card perishes the next card to be played in its spot will inherit all of this card’s sigils, except for this one.

items.name: Dervish
items.description: During your end step, all cards on your side of the field shift one lane towards the bell. If a card would move off the board, it moves to the lane farthest from the bell instead.

items.name: Warper
items.description: During your end step, move this card to another empty step on your board, if possible.

items.name: Comforting Aura
items.description: During your end step, the cards left and right this card gain 1 health, up to 1 over their normal maximum.

items.name: Energy Surge
items.description: When this card is played, you gain three max energy.

items.name: Gem Dependent
items.description: If there are no gems on your side of the field, this card perishes.

items.name: Area Of Effect Strike

items.name: Chaos Magic
items.description: While this card is on the field, both players flip their main decks upside-down, seeing the card faces.

items.name: Extra Seconds
items.description: Once per game, you may pay 6 max energy to take an additional turn after this one.

items.name: Chaotic Blast
items.description: When this card is played, choose another card on the field. That card loses all power and sigils, its name becomes Topaz Mox, and it provides 1 Topaz Gem.

items.name: Psionic Guidance
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of “Ceremorph” cards on your side of the field, to a maximum of 5.

items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent empty lane. Search 1 “Frog” card from your deck and play it in this card’s previous lane.

items.description: While this card is on the field, it provides 1 “Garnet Gem”.

items.name: Ambidextrous
items.description: While this card is on the field during your draw step you may draw an additional card from either of your decks.

items.name: Coagulating Enchantment
items.description: When this card completes a spell field, all non pillar cards within are worth 2 blood when sacrificed.

items.name: Mental Gemnastics

items.description: While this card is on the field, the opposing card’s sigils are nullified.

items.description: This card strikes all cards on the opponents field when attacking, if there are no cards on the opponents field it attacks directly once.

items.description: When this card is played within a circuit, you gain 1 energy cell.

items.name: Trickster
items.description: When this card would be attacked, swap its position with another of your cards, if possible. (The attack than continues as normal.)

items.name: Sword and Shield
items.description: After the first time this card kills another card, the next time this card would be damaged, it is not.

items.description: When this card is damaged, search your deck for a “Spider” card can add it to your hand.

items.description: While this card is on the field, all “Mox” cards produce prisms instead.

items.description: During your play step, you may pay 3 energy to draw from your side deck. This effect may be used once per turn.

items.description: When this card kills an opposing card, its power increases by 1, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Rampager
items.description: During your end step, this card shifts to an adjacent lane, swapping places with the card in that lane if there is one.

items.description: When this card is played, search 1 “Rabbit” from your deck to your hand.

items.description: When this card damages the health of an opposing card, this card restores 1 health, to a maximum of 5 health.

items.description: When this card is played, it provides 1 energy cell to its owner.

items.description: This card’s stats are unaffected by other sigils.

items.description: While this card is on the field, all “Mox” cards on your side of the field gain 1 power.

items.name: Squirrel Shedder

items.description: When this card perishes, draw 1 card from your deck.

items.description: Whenever a card is sacrificed, this card gains 1 power, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.description: The first time this card is damaged, negate that damage.

items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of gems provided on your side of the field, to a maximum of 5.

items.name: Golduggery

items.description: This card attacks only the lanes left and right of the opposing space when it attacks.

items.name: Trifurcated Strike
items.description: This card attacks the lanes left and right of, as well as, the opposing space when it attacks.

items.description: When this card gets damaged, swap it’s stats.

items.name: Bloodlust
items.description: When this card kills another card, it’s power is increased by 1 to a maximum of 5.

items.name: Aquanaut
items.description: If the opposing card has the waterborne sigil, this card attacks it directly.

items.name: Lurker
items.description: If this card attacked last turn, it does not attack this turn.

items.name: Tentaceful
items.description: Attacks targeting this card instead hit the owner of this card directly. During your next draw step, it is shuffled back into your deck and replaced by any other tentacle card. That card will act as if it has this sigil.

items.name: Stacker
items.description: You may play this on top of another “Stacker” card without paying this card’s cost to form a stack.

items.name: Fecundity
items.description: When this card is played, search 1 copy of it from your deck and add it to your hand.

items.name: Battery Powered
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of times its owner has spent energy this turn, up to a maximum of 5.

items.name: Sprinter
items.description: During your end step, this card shifts to an adjacent empty lane.

items.name: Double Strike
items.description: This card attacks the opposing space an additional time when it attacks.

items.name: Fledgling
items.description: During your next draw step after this card is played, search 1 “[Token]” from your deck and play it over this.

items.name: Strong Hand
items.description: This cards’ power is equal to the number of cards in the owners’ hand to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Bone Digger
items.description: During your end step, this card generates 1 bone.

items.name: Corpse Eater
items.description: When a card on your side of the field perishes by battle, this card is played in its place.

items.name: Brood Parasite
items.description: When this card is played, play 1 “Broken Egg” card in the opposing space if that space is empty.

items.name: Unkillable
items.description: When this card perishes, it goes back to your hand instead of being discarded.

items.name: Starving
items.description: When this card is sacrificed, instead of perishing, it loses 2 power. (If this card has 0 power, it gains 2 power when sacrificed, instead).

items.name: Fleeting
items.description: During the second end step after this card has been played, it will perish.

items.name: 9 Lives
items.description: When this card is sacrificed, it does not perish. If this card is sacrificed 9 times, discard it, search your deck for an “Undead Cat”, and play it in this card’s place.

items.name: Mighty Leap
items.description: If the opposing card has the Airborne sigil, it attacks this card instead of attacking directly.

items.name: One-Half Bones
items.description: This card’s power is equal to half the number of bones the owner of this card has collected, rounded down.

items.name: Touch Of Death
items.description: When this card damages an opposing card, that card perishes.

items.name: Worthy Sacrifice
items.description: This card is worth 3 blood when it is sacrificed.

items.name: Boneless
items.description: This card does not generate a bone when it perishes.

items.name: Bees Within
items.description: When this card is damaged, search 1 “Bee” from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Brittle
items.description: During your end step, this card perishes.

items.name: Bell Ringer
items.description: During your end step, this card’s power increases by 1, to a maximum of 5.

items.name: Dam Builder
items.description: While this card is on the field, you may play “Dam” cards for 1 bone.

items.name: Wood Harvester
items.description: When this card is played, you may search 2 “Dam” cards from your side deck.

items.name: Detonator
items.description: When this card perishes, adjacent and opposing cards are dealt 10 damage.

items.name: Blood Bloated
items.description: This card is worth 2 blood when sacrificed.

items.name: Airborne
items.description: This card attacks the opponent directly instead of the opposing card.

items.name: Waterborne
items.description: Attacks targetting this card instead hit the owner of this card directly.

items.name: Ant Spawner
items.description: When this card is played, search 1 card with the “Colony” sigil from your main deck and add it to your hand.

items.name: Colony
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of cards with the Colony sigil on your side of the field.

items.name: Deep Seafarer
items.description: Attacks targetting this card instead hit the owner of this card directly, If the opposing card has the waterborne sigil, this card attacks it directly.

items.name: School
items.description: Once per turn you may pay 5 bones to search a card with the Waterborne sigil.

items.name: Leader
items.description: While this card is on the field increase the power of the cards left and right by 1.

items.name: Amorphous
items.description: When this card is played, select 1 card from your discard pile. This card gains the selected cards’ sigils until it perishes.
